prompt: Create an ultra-detailed cinematic fantasy scene inside a messy teenage football fan bedroom at night, filled with comic book posters, football scarves, trading-card displays, scattered clothes, gaming controllers, magazines, and warm LED strip lighting around the ceiling. The central subject is Lionel Messi, shown from behind in an Argentina-style white-and-sky-blue striped jersey with the name MESSI and number 10, black shorts, white socks, cleats, and a captain armband, stepping into a gigantic open illustrated comic book leaning upright against the wall. The comic cover should be titled in huge bold letters “MESSI” with the subtitle “THE CELESTIAL JOURNEY”; add small faux comic issue details in the upper left. Inside the comic page, depict a cracked paper portal with a swirling electric-blue cosmic vortex, glowing stadium floodlights, torn panels, flying paper shards, blue sparks, and the golden World Cup trophy floating in the center. Make the player appear halfway between the real bedroom and the illustrated comic world, with dramatic rim light from the portal and warm room light from a desk lamp. Include exactly 6 major bedroom fan-detail groups: 1 football scarves across the top walls, 2 framed/poster football images, 3 a grid of collectible cards on the left wall, 4 a white desk with lamp and pencil cup, 5 a black gaming chair, and 6 floor clutter with two game controllers, loose comics/magazines, and piles of clothing. Use a vertical 9:16 composition, cinematic depth of field, hyperrealistic texture mixed with comic-book illustration, dynamic motion, glowing particles, detailed shadows, and a magical sports-adventure mood. Avoid logos that exactly copy real clubs except the player name and football-inspired colors; no watermark.
